# constraints-ml.txt — ML dependency constraints for reproducible builds.
#
# Generated by: pip freeze (from validated environment)
# Referenced in Dockerfile: pip install -c constraints-ml.txt
#
# This file locks transitive dependencies to versions that are known
# to work together.  Update by running pip freeze in a validated env
# after confirming all tests pass (including slow SetFit tests).
#
# Core matrix (A1):
#   setfit>=1.1.3,<1.2
#   transformers>=4.45,<5
#   sentence-transformers>=3.0,<4
#   torch (CPU-only, installed separately)
#
# NOTE: Populate this file with the output of `pip freeze` from a
# validated environment where all tests pass.  Until then, the
# constraints in pyproject.toml [ml] extras provide the bounds.
